title: FaceTime Features
drDigitalIntro: During a FaceTime call, you can mute your microphone (so they can't hear you), turn off your camera (they see a black screen instead of video), or switch to audio-only. If you want to share what's on your screen, FaceTime has screen-sharing. Portrait mode makes your background blurry and puts you in focus. Noise cancellation reduces background noise. You can also group FaceTime with up to 32 people.
drDigitalSuccess: You know all the tools to make FaceTime calls work for you!
drDigitalHint: Mute and camera buttons are in the call controls.
